com.hp.workpath.api.copier

Class CopyAttributes.CopyAttributesBuilder<T extends CopyAttributes.CopyAttributesBuilder<T>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyAttributes.CopyAttributesBuilder<T>
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    CopyAttributes.CopyBuilder, CopyAttributes.StoreCopyBuilder
    Enclosing class:
    CopyAttributes

    public abstract static class CopyAttributes.CopyAttributesBuilder<T extends CopyAttributes.CopyAttributesBuilder<T>>
extends java.lang.Object
    Builder for creating CopyAttributes configured to copying.
    Since:
    API 3

    • Method Detail

      • setColorMode

        public T setColorMode(CopyAttributes.ColorMode colorMode)
        Specifies the set of colors which the scanned output will reside within. For example, monospace indicates that the scanned output only includes black, white, and various shades of gray.
        Parameters:
        colorMode - The set of colors which the scanned output will reside within
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if colorMode is null
        Since:
        API 3

      • setOrientation

        public T setOrientation(CopyAttributes.Orientation orientation)
        Specifies the set of original orientation which the scanned output will reside within.
        Parameters:
        orientation - The original orientation of document for scanning
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if orientation is null.
        Since:
        API 3

      • setScanDuplex

        public T setScanDuplex(CopyAttributes.Duplex duplex)
        Sets Scan Duplex for scanning
        Parameters:
        duplex - Book or Flip
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if duplex is null
        Since:
        API 3

      • setScanSize

        public T setScanSize(CopyAttributes.ScanSize scanSize)
        Specifies the size of the scanned image to be copied.
        Parameters:
        scanSize - The size of the image to be produced from the scanned document / image.
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if scanSize is null.
        Since:
        API 3

      • setCopyPreview

        public T setCopyPreview(CopyAttributes.CopyPreview copyPreview)
        Sets the copy preview param. This parameter forces showing a preview of scanned image
        Parameters:
        copyPreview - Scan preview flag value
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - is copyPreview is null;
